npcs.name: Shemeshka the Marauder
npcs.role: Arcanaloth crime boss — King of the Cross-Trade
npcs.description: The most powerful information broker in Sigil. An arcanaloth who trades in secrets and pulls strings across the city. Has her own agenda regarding the multiversal glitch — and the party is useful to her, for now.

npcs.name: A'kin
npcs.description: An unusually pleasant arcanaloth who runs a curiosity shop in Sigil. One of the few genuinely helpful faces in the city. Knows more than he lets on.

npcs.name: Parisa Taralmak
npcs.description: Head of the Dustmen faction. Believes all existence is a prelude to True Death. Controls the Mortuary — where the party woke up.

npcs.name: Zadara
npcs.description: A titan with her own interests in the Outlands. Powerful enough to be a genuine asset — or a threat. Her motivations are not immediately clear.

npcs.name: Rondixiant
npcs.role: Missing modron — key to the mystery
npcs.description: A modron carrying dangerous information about the multiversal glitch. Went missing somewhere in the planes. Finding it is central to understanding what happened to the party.

npcs.name: Vrischika
npcs.description: Runs a high-end shop of rare and strange items in Sigil. Business-minded, not unkind. A useful contact if the party has coin.

npcs.name: Magga Bearhar
npcs.description: A halfling Dustman working at the Mortuary. One of the first faces the party sees after waking. May be more sympathetic to the party than her faction would prefer.
